news.t: GraniteShares Announces Change in ETF Lineup

overview.description: The GraniteShares 2x Long BULL Daily ETF (BULX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Webull Corporation (NASDAQ: BULL) stock. BULX was launched on Sep 3, 2025 and is issued by GraniteShares.

data.title: GraniteShares Announces Change in ETF Lineup
data.text: NEW YORK, May 18, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- GraniteShares announced today that it will close and liquidate the following ETFs:
